parsed_review.summary: CP00-842 is a descriptor-only RP27 Platform Extensibility "Claude closeout / synthetic fixture bridge" pack (10 units, risk A, range RP27.P09.M05.S16-RP27.P09.M06.S03; deliverables implementation:6/hermes_evidence:1/claude_review:2/security_audit:1; micro_titles Permission And Audit Binding:7/Synthetic Fixture Set:3), inspected via Read/Grep/Glob only. Coverage matches the live plan: included units, titles (CLAUDE_REVIEW_ROWS.slice(15,22) for M05 + slice(0,3) for M06 = the exact 7+3 manifest unit titles), and all deliverable/phase/micro/title distributions align with PLATFORM_EXTENSIBILITY_CP842_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:1753) and are enforced by validators (validators.js:2400 coverage, 2436 descriptor, 2491 contract). Per-row no-leak guards hold: createRow (registry.js:1932) defaults descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false and all *_included/*_secret_included false via PLATFORM_EXTENSIBILITY_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:35); the CP842 case-set builder (registry.js:2511) passes no overrides, and the descriptor validator rejects api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed/permission_decision_written/audit_event_written/writes_product_state=true (validators.js:2476-2481). The generated contract is consistent (current/latest_pack CP00-842, latest_projection descriptor PlatformExtensibilityCp842ClaudeCloseoutSyntheticFixtureBridgeDescriptor, validation.valid=true with no_write_attestation all false; contract.json:38-69/424/51118); a grep across the entire contract found no dangerous *_included/*_written/*_issued/runtime_execution/enterprise-trust flag set true, and no claude_is_final_approval/promotes_claude_to_final_approval/runtime_opening_allowed=true. Tests (model.test.js:692-726) assert zero coverage/descriptor validation errors, runtime-closed flags, a read_only non-final-approval Claude packet, and CP00-842 contract currency. command-evidence.json reports node --check x3, npm run rp27:platform-extensibility:validate, and platform node --test all at exit 0 (agent-reported; not re-run here, per read-only); all referenced npm scripts exist (package.json). Authority boundary preserved: Claude read-only and not final approver (claude_packet.read_only=true/promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, validators.js:2448), human approval required for runtime opening, enterprise trust not claimed by local validation. Hermes packet is deterministic control-plane review evidence only (gate H27, emits_runtime_receipt=false, registry.js:2815), not embedded product runtime. Manifest honestly holds production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false/status=in_progress with the pack-level review pending exactly this receipt; review readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0) and no invalid prior attempts are recorded — no overclaim. One P3 metadata nit on changed-file-scope.json; no P0/P1/P2. Does not block CP00-842 pack closeout or this CP's goal closeout; final human approval for runtime opening remains outside this receipt (next boundary CP00-843 / RP27.P09.M06.S04).

findings.title: new-session-handoff.md double-classified in changed-file-scope.json
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md is listed under both untracked_implementation_files (line 144) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 151) of changed-file-scope.json. The authoritative pack scope disagrees: manifest.json active_pack_required_untracked_files and worktree_transition_policy list only artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-842 and docs/closeout-packs/cp00-842 as required untracked files and place new-session-handoff.md under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (manifest.json:472). The file itself is a stale (2026-06-08) generic onboarding/handoff document with no CP00-842 deliverable content and no production_ready claim. active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is [], so no required file was dropped from review. Impact is cosmetic classification only.
findings.recommendation: Optional: remove docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md from untracked_implementation_files in changed-file-scope.json so it is classified solely as an unrelated preserved dirty file, matching the manifest. No action required for closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking. Accepted as a harmless metadata quirk in the review-harness scope file; the manifest is authoritative for pack scope, the file carries no CP00-842 claim, and no required file was omitted. No fix required before closeout.
